overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from inside a BMW on a rainy night highway. The windshield wipers are active as the vehicle navigates through moderate traffic including trucks and cars under artificial street lighting. The footage shows realistic rain physics and wet road conditions typical of a driving simulator.

segments.scene_description: Driving on a rain-soaked multi-lane highway at night with active windshield wipers. The vehicle approaches an overhead gantry while following a semi-truck, with guardrails visible on both sides and street lights providing artificial illumination.

events.description: passing directly under the overhead highway gantry
overtaking a red car on the right side

agents.ego_description: maintaining highway speed while passing under the gantry and overtaking slower traffic

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes under the overhead gantry structure and continues along the wet highway. A red car is overtaken on the right as the drive continues through the rainy night with street lights now visible on the right side.

segments.scene_description: Driving toward a highway exit area where traffic lights and exit signage become visible. The vehicle passes a white car while maintaining position in the main lane, with exit ramp markings appearing on the right side of the road.

events.description: passing a green car on the left side
overtaking a white car on the right side

agents.ego_description: cruising on the open highway passing multiple vehicles in both lanes

white car being overtaken on the right

segments.scene_description: Continuing on an open stretch of highway past the exit junction, with trees now visible on the right side. The vehicle overtakes a green car on the left and a white car on the right while street lights stretch into the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective of a vehicle navigating a rain-soaked highway at night, moving from a congested stretch of traffic toward a more open road. It begins with the rhythmic motion of windshield wipers as the car follows a semi-truck toward a looming overhead gantry under the glow of artificial street lighting. As the vehicle passes beneath the gantry, the camera glides past a red car on the right, maintaining a steady pace along the shimmering, wet asphalt. The scene then shifts toward a highway exit area, where the environment opens up to reveal traffic lights, exit signage, and ramp markings while passing a white car. Finally, the road expands past the junction and into a stretch lined with trees, as the vehicle overtakes a green and white car while street lights stretch into the rainy distance.
